Definition: Date when the product was actually delivered to the customer.
Purpose / Meaning: Used to measure delays and calculate on-time delivery and OTIF.

Definition: Average delay duration converted from milliseconds to days.
Purpose / Meaning: Converts stored delay time into days for easier analysis.

Definition: Time difference between requested delivery date and actual delivery date when delivery is late.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" > "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" THEN TIME_BETWEEN("_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date","_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date") END
Purpose / Meaning: Measures how late deliveries occur.

Definition: Predicts whether an order is likely to fail OTIF. 0.4 is suggested by the client.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN ("_ARIS.Case"."Risk ratio") > 0.4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 indicates high risk of failing OTIF.

Definition: Categorizes delay duration into ranges.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN ("_ARIS.Case"."Avg Days Delay Duration">0) AND ("_ARIS.Case"."Avg Days Delay Duration"<=10) THEN 'A.1-10' WHEN ("_ARIS.Case"."Avg Days Delay Duration">=11) AND ("_ARIS.Case"."Avg Days Delay Duration"<=20) THEN 'B.11-20' WHEN ("_ARIS.Case"."Avg Days Delay Duration">=21) AND ("_ARIS.Case"."Avg Days Delay Duration"<=30) THEN 'C.21-30' WHEN ("_ARIS.Case"."Avg Days Delay Duration">=31) AND ("_ARIS.Case"."Avg Days Delay Duration"<=40) THEN 'D.31-40' ELSE 'Delay More than 40 Days' END
Purpose / Meaning: Helps analyze delay severity.

Definition: Identifies orders delayed and not fully delivered.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" > "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" AND "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Delivered Quantity" < "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: Flags orders that are both late and incomplete.

Definition: Unique identifier for each delivery.
Purpose / Meaning: Used as a primary key to identify individual deliveries.

Definition: Source city of shipment.
Purpose / Meaning: Identifies the origin location of a shipment.

Definition: Checks whether delivered quantity meets ordered quantity.
Source Column: Sales Order DIM_csv.Delivered Quantity / Order Quantity
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Delivered Quantity" >= "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means order was delivered in full.

Definition: Checks whether delivery occurred before or on requested date.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" != NULL_DATE AND "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" != NULL_DATE AND "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" <= "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means order was delivered on time.

Definition: Percentage of orders delivered on time.
PQL Logic: QUERY(SUM("_ARIS.Case"."On- time") / CT("Sales Order DIM_csv"."Sales Order Number"))
Purpose / Meaning: Gives an overall on-time delivery rate.

Definition: Orders not yet fully delivered or partially delivered — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI. NOTE: SQL JOIN approach undercounts vs ARIS (JOIN drops rows + Delivery_Status strings may differ); use cases table as ground truth.

Definition: Orders likely to be delayed due to issues (e.g. Carrier, traffic, weather).
Source Column: Delivery DIM_csv.Delivery_Status / Supply_Chain_KPI_Tuned_5500_csv.Delay Reason for Delivery
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN ("Delivery DIM_csv"."Delivery_Status")!= 'Delivered' AND "Supply_Chain_KPI_Tuned_5500_csv"."Delay Reason for Delivery" != NULL_TEXT THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: Flags undelivered orders with a known delay reason.

Definition: Orders delivered On-Time and In-Full.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" <= "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" AND "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Delivered Quantity" >= "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: Core KPI: 1 means order met both On-Time and In-Full criteria.

Definition: Predicted OTIF success probability.
Purpose / Meaning: Combines on-time and in-full probability to forecast OTIF.

Definition: Delivery date requested by the customer.
Purpose / Meaning: Baseline date used to measure on-time delivery.

Definition: Combined risk indicator.
Purpose / Meaning: Average of three risk signals; used in Check Predictive OTIF.

Definition: Indicates shipment affected by disruption.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN ("Supply_Chain_KPI_Single_Sheet_5500_csv"."Shipment Affected"=1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means the shipment was impacted by a disruption.

Definition: Detects insufficient warehouse inventory.
Source Column: Warehouse DIM_csv.QUANTITY / Sales Order DIM_csv.Order Quantity
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "Warehouse DIM_csv"."QUANTITY" < "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means warehouse stock is less than what was ordered.

Definition: Delay caused by route disruptions.
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN "Supply_Chain_KPI_Tuned_5500_csv"."Delivery Impacted by Route Disruptions" = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means delivery was impacted by a route disruption.

Definition: Operational issues occurring in warehouse (labour shortage, inventory mismatch, system downtime).
PQL Logic: CASE WHEN ("Supply_Chain_KPI_Single_Sheet_5500_csv"."Warehouse Issue"!='None') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Purpose / Meaning: 1 means a warehouse issue was reported for that order.

Definition: Percentage of orders delivered on time — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for on-time delivery rate.

Definition: Average delay in days across all late orders — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for average delay duration.

Definition: Total number of distinct materials handled — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for material count.

Definition: Percentage or count of orders at risk of failing delivery — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for at-risk orders.

Definition: Total monetary value of delayed orders in EUR — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for delay cost.

Definition: Percentage of orders packed correctly — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for packing quality.

Definition: Count of shipments affected by disruptions — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for disruption impact.

Definition: Total value of orders at financial risk in EUR — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for financial exposure.

Definition: Total savings lost due to supply chain failures in EUR — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for lost savings.

Definition: Warehouse or transport utilization efficiency as a percentage — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for resource utilization.

Definition: Total number of active warehouses — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for warehouse count.

Definition: Total number of operators active in the supply chain — sourced directly from ARIS cases table.
Purpose / Meaning: Pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard KPI for workforce count.

PQL Logic: SUM("_ARIS.Case"."OTIF") / CT("Sales Order DIM_csv"."Sales Order Number")
